• Strong analytical background Strong organizational skills.

job_title: Full Stack Developer - Product Configuration Solutions (f/m/d)
job_description:
• Serve as an internal IS consultant, aligning innovative solutions with business needs while collaborating with stakeholders, solution consultants, and partners to deliver high-quality outcomes.
• Degree in Software Engineering, IT, or related field (HTL, FH, University) or equivalent practical experience.
• Ability to demonstrate your experience in software engineering and IT, with established skills in designing and implementing robust solutions.
• Develop and customize product configurators within IQ, ensuring robust functionality and user-friendly design.
• Integrate IQ with enterprise systems to enable end-to-end process automation.
• Manage the full configurator lifecycle—from architecture and implementation to maintenance, troubleshooting, and continuous improvement.
• Interest and affinity for automation products and the drive to create user-friendly configurators that simplify complex processes.
• Teamplayer and open-minded personYou are at ease communicating in German and English (spoken and written).
